title: PI Handbook 5: Policies & Guidelines (2024-07-01 edition)
content: PI Handbook 5: Policies & Guidelines is the consolidated reference document maintained by the Morgan State University Office of Research Administration. The 2024-07-01 edition compiles the full text of all 20 research policies that govern sponsored research at Morgan State, including the three Board-of-Regents-approved policies (Conflicts of Interest in Research and Development, Misconduct in Academic Research, and Intellectual Property). Principal Investigators, co-PIs, research staff, and department administrators should consult PI Handbook 5 for the authoritative text of each policy. Effective date: 2024-07-01. Direct PDF link is provided in procedure_url.
